creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Fred from comment #0)
> Could you please update the port to the latest Hiwatha 10.2
> https://www.hiawatha-webserver.org/weblog/112

Thanks for your interest, Fred.
While I could update the port to 10.2. IMHO this is still pretty early in
this release cycle (only 3 days old).
I also see this release brings the letsencrypt dependency, if that option
is chosen. The only other change it brings, is the fix for HideProxy.
Which I recently added to 10.1, as 10.1_1.
I'll do some initial testing. But I'm going to wait about 30 days, before I
push the new version. This will help insure any last minute bug fixes
won't have to be added later. As they'll already have been found, and
incorporated in the (source) download.

Hope you understand, and thanks again for the info!

--Chris
